date_created_from.description: Timestamp in Unix the replication from Babelforce API will start from. For example 1651363200 which corresponds to 2022-05-01 00:00:00.

date_created_to.description: Timestamp in Unix the replication from Babelforce will be up to. For example 1651363200 which corresponds to 2022-05-01 00:00:00.

base_url.description: Placeholder base URL used only to construct the engine runtime before the Tier-2 hook delegates to the legacy connector.

mode.description: Set to fixture for credential-free legacy fixture tests.
